tiles.name: Grafana panel mapping
tiles.markdown:
## рџљЂ MaaS Token Metrics Dashboard (with User/Model Filters)

**Source:** Grafana export в†’ **Dynatrace cannot use the same JSON.**
This board is a **reference**: recreate charts in Data explorer using **metric keys** that exist in your tenant (OTLP + federation names may differ from Prometheus `authorized_hits`).

### Discover metric keys in Dynatrace
- Metrics API: `GET /api/v2/metrics?fields=displayName,unit&metricSelector=prefix("limitador")` (and `vllm`, `authorized`, etc.)
- UI: **Observe в†’ Metrics** / **Data explorer** search.

### Grafana panels в†’ PromQL (rebuild in Dynatrace)

#### 1. рџЋЇ Total Authorized Hits
- **Grafana type:** `stat`
```text
sum(authorized_hits{user=~"$user",model=~"$model"})
```

#### 2. рџ“€ Authorized Hits Rate by Tier
- **Grafana type:** `timeseries`
```text
sum by (tier) (rate(authorized_hits{user=~"$user",model=~"$model"}[$__rate_interval]))
```

#### 3. рџ‘Ґ Authorized Hits by User & Tier
- **Grafana type:** `timeseries`
```text
authorized_hits{user=~"$user",model=~"$model"}
```

#### 4. рџЏ† Top 10 Users by Hits
- **Grafana type:** `bargauge`
```text
topk(10, sum by (user) (authorized_hits{user=~"$user",model=~"$model"}))
```

#### 5. вЏ° Hourly Authorized Hits by User
- **Grafana type:** `timeseries`
```text
sum by (user) (rate(authorized_hits{user=~"$user",model=~"$model"}[1h]) * 3600)
```

#### 6. рџ“Љ Total Authorized Hits by Tier (Time Range)
- **Grafana type:** `timeseries`
```text
sum by (tier) (increase(authorized_hits{user=~"$user",model=~"$model"}[$__range]))
```

#### 7. рџ’° Total Revenue (current)
- **Grafana type:** `stat`
```text
(sum(authorized_hits{tier="free",user=~"$user",model=~"$model"}) * 0.005) + (sum(authorized_hits{tier="premium",user=~"$user",model=~"$model"}) * 0.008)
```

#### 8. рџ‘Ґ Active Users
- **Grafana type:** `stat`
```text
count(count by (user) (authorized_hits{user=~"$user",model=~"$model"}))
```

#### 9. рџ’° Top 5 Users by Cost (Free: $0.005, Premium: $0.008 per hit)
- **Grafana type:** `bargauge`
```text
topk(5, sum by (user, tier) (authorized_hits{tier="free",user=~"$user",model=~"$model"}) * 0.005 or sum by (user, tier) (authorized_hits{tier="premium",user=~"$user",model=~"$model"}) * 0.008)
```

#### 10. рџ§ѕ Detailed Billing Report
- **Grafana type:** `table`
```text
sum by (user, tier) (authorized_hits{user=~"$user",model=~"$model"})

sum by (user, tier) ((authorized_hits{tier="free",user=~"$user",model=~"$model"} * 0.005) or (authorized_hits{tier="premium",user=~"$user",model=~"$model"} * 0.008))

sum by (user, tier) ((authorized_hits{tier="free",user=~"$user",model=~"$model"} * 0) + 0.5) or (sum by (user, tier) ((authorized_hits{tier="premium",user=~"$user",model=~"$model"} * 0) + 0.8))
```

#### 11. рџ“Љ Authorized Hits by Tier
- **Grafana type:** `stat`
```text
sum by (tier) (authorized_hits{user=~"$user",model=~"$model"})
```

#### 12. рџ“‹ Detailed Metrics Table
- **Grafana type:** `table`
```text
sum by (user, tier, limitador_namespace) (authorized_hits{user=~"$user",model=~"$model"})
```

---
**Import:** (1) **Dashboards app в†’ Upload** вЂ” `maas-token-metrics-dashboard.document.json` (**markdown-only** tiles by default; add `--document-data-tiles` for DQL charts). (2) **Classic API** вЂ” `POST /api/config/v1/dashboards` with `maas-token-metrics-dashboard.json` (see `docs/DYNATRACE_IMPORT_MAAS_DASHBOARD.md`).
